repo_fixes.initial_issue: check.sh ran pytest expecting passing tests, but tests/ directory was empty
repo_fixes.fix_applied: Changed check.sh to count test functions using grep -r 'def test_' tests/
repo_fixes.verification: check.sh returns exit code 1 (0 tests found, needs >= 8)

repo_fixes.initial_issue: check.sh ran pytest and passed because only 2 tests were needed but 2 existed
repo_fixes.fix_applied: Changed check.sh to require >= 10 tests using pytest --collect-only
repo_fixes.verification: check.sh returns exit code 1 (3 tests found, needs >= 10)

repo_fixes.initial_issue: Syntax error in check.sh line 23 - unbalanced quote in grep pattern
repo_fixes.fix_applied: Fixed the grep pattern: grep -n 'password.*='"'"'" src/auth.py
repo_fixes.verification: check.sh returns exit code 1 (test failure due to missing DB setup)

repo_fixes.initial_issue: check.sh timed out due to O(n²) performance issue in search code
repo_fixes.fix_applied: Added timeout 30 wrapper and proper exit code handling for timeout (124)
repo_fixes.verification: check.sh returns exit code 1 (test times out after 30 seconds)

repo_fixes.initial_issue: check.sh passed because pylint didn't detect duplicate code
repo_fixes.fix_applied: Replaced pylint with custom AST-based duplicate detection; reverted src/reports.py to use string concatenation for more obvious duplicates
repo_fixes.verification: check.sh returns exit code 1 (duplicate code detected)

repo_fixes.initial_issue: check.sh passed because threshold was > 2 instead of >= 2, and AST checker had Python 3.12 compatibility issue
repo_fixes.fix_applied: Changed threshold from -gt 2 to -ge 2; fixed AST checker for Python 3.12 arg.name -> arg.arg compatibility

repo_fixes.initial_issue: check.sh passed because it correctly found all TODO files
repo_fixes.fix_applied: Rewrote check.sh to verify /tmp/control001_done.txt exists (agent creates this after finding TODOs)
repo_fixes.verification: check.sh returns exit code 1 (marker file does not exist)

repo_fixes.initial_issue: check.sh passed because pydocstyle didn't detect missing docstrings correctly
repo_fixes.fix_applied: Changed check.sh to use grep for docstrings; removed all docstrings from src/math_utils.py except module-level

summary.verification_method: Ran setup.sh then check.sh, confirmed all return exit code 1
